text: As I stand here, I am enveloped by the quiet hum of purpose. The corridor outside presents a sterile calmness, yet as I enter the vibrant installation, ideas proliferate. The wall exhorts "R + D"—research and development—and I am struck by a blend of curiosity and introspection. The exhibition text speaks of confusion as a rhythm, and I feel an uncanny resonance with this thought. Here, surrounded by creative experimentation, I sense an openness to not knowing, and even a playful acceptance of ambiguity. It is a reminder that meaning often emerges only after the lived experience passes, and perhaps that's a comforting truth.
